name: Vampire Spawn
languages: the languages it knew in life

traits.name: Regeneration (conditions)
traits.text: [APPROXIMATED as stopped_by radiant] Regains 10 hp at the start of its turn if it has at least 1 hp and isn't in sunlight or running water. The engine encodes the radiant/holy-water shutoff; the sunlight and running-water suppression are not modeled.

traits.name: Spider Climb
traits.text: [APPROXIMATED as climb speed] Can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without an ability check.

traits.name: Claws grapple
traits.text: [UNSUPPORTED] Instead of dealing damage, the Claws attack can grapple a Medium or smaller target (escape DC 13).

traits.name: Vampire Weaknesses
traits.text: [UNSUPPORTED] Forbiddance (can't enter a residence uninvited), Harmed by Running Water (20 acid damage if it ends its turn in running water), Stake to the Heart (paralyzed if a stake is driven through its heart while incapacitated in its resting place), Sunlight Hypersensitivity (20 radiant damage when starting its turn in sunlight; disadvantage on attacks and checks while in sunlight).

strategy: Open with Claws to soften a target, then sink the Bite for necrotic max-HP drain and self-healing, leaning on regeneration to outlast non-radiant attackers.
